assertions.description: Calls pagerank.assign(graph) to write scores onto node attributes
Uses bidirectional or dijkstra.bidirectional to find path from eve to dave
Calls graph.export() and serializes to JSON
Nodes have both name and followerCount attributes

qualitative_notes: Uses addDirectedEdge instead of idiomatic addEdge — redundant on DirectedGraph but not incorrect. Otherwise fully correct. Passes alpha option to pagerank which is not needed but harmless.
